description_long: This is a rectangular wooden bench with a modern, open-frame design and a recessed central area. The bench features a wide, flat seating surface composed of evenly spaced wooden slats, bordered by a solid wooden frame. The legs are formed by two angled wooden panels on each end, creating a visually striking X-shaped support structure. The central recessed area is surrounded by the seat and appears to be lined with a lighter material, possibly for decorative or structural purposes. The bench lacks both a backrest and armrests, emphasizing its minimalist and functional style. Its robust construction and weather-resistant materials make it suitable for public spaces such as parks, plazas, or urban sidewalks.
description: A modern, rectangular wooden bench with a recessed center and X-shaped angled panel legs, designed for public outdoor use. The bench has a slatted seat, no backrest or armrests, and a sturdy, minimalist appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bench, the slatted seat, and the angled X-shaped wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile, the depth of the recessed center, and the thickness of the wooden panels.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the slatted seat and angled legs from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the bench's depth and the structure of the supporting panels.
attribute_leg_design: angled wooden panel supports forming an X-shape
